title: ProjectRemoveMethod
description: Contract for project.remove JSON-RPC method. Soft-removes a project by setting its status to removed; files on disk are never touched.

projectId.description: ID of the project to remove

ProjectRemoveResponse.title: ProjectRemoveResponse
ProjectRemoveResponse.description: Result of project.remove. Errors: validation_error (1001) if the project does not exist or is already removed.
